moments.title: England kick off World Cup 2026 campaign
moments.blurb: England faces Croatia in their opening group stage match of the FIFA World Cup 2026 tonight, held in Dallas, USA, with kick-off at 9pm BST.

angles.name: Match Build-up
angles.copy: It's finally here! England kick off their World Cup 2026 journey tonight against Croatia. Who's ready for the Three Lions? #WorldCup2026

angles.name: Game On
angles.copy: The whistle's blown! England vs Croatia is LIVE in the FIFA World Cup 2026. Get behind the lads!

angles.name: Post-Match Reaction
angles.copy: Full-time: England's World Cup opener against Croatia is done. Reaction to the big game coming up.

moments.title: Summer Solstice marks longest day of the year
moments.blurb: The Summer Solstice, marking the longest day and shortest night of the year in the Northern Hemisphere, occurs on Sunday, June 21st, 2026, at 9:24 AM BST.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: Get ready for maximum daylight! The Summer Solstice is this Sunday, June 21st, bringing us the longest day of the year.

angles.name: Celebration
angles.copy: Sunday is the Summer Solstice! How are you planning to make the most of the longest day?

moments.title: Sir Paul McCartney turns 84
moments.blurb: Legendary Beatles and Wings co-founder Sir Paul McCartney celebrates his 84th birthday on Thursday, June 18th.

angles.name: Birthday Wish
angles.copy: Happy 84th Birthday to the iconic Sir Paul McCartney! What’s your favourite Beatles or Wings track?

angles.name: Legacy
angles.copy: Celebrating 84 years of a musical legend! Paul McCartney’s influence is still felt today.

moments.title: Taylor Swift holds UK Singles Chart No.1
moments.blurb: Taylor Swift's 'I Knew It, I Knew You' remains the UK's Official Singles Chart Number 1 for the week ending June 18, 2026.

angles.name: Chart News
angles.copy: She's done it again! Taylor Swift's 'I Knew It, I Knew You' holds strong at UK Number 1. What a track!

angles.name: Weekend Playlist
angles.copy: Still topping the charts! Taylor Swift's 'I Knew It, I Knew You' is your Official UK Number 1. Perfect for your weekend playlist.

moments.title: House Of The Dragon Season 3 returns
moments.blurb: The highly anticipated third season of HBO's 'House Of The Dragon' begins streaming on Monday, June 22nd.

angles.name: New Season Hype
angles.copy: Fire and Blood returns! House Of The Dragon Season 3 drops this Monday. Who's ready for more Westeros drama?

angles.name: Weekend Binge Prep
angles.copy: Clear your schedules: House Of The Dragon Season 3 is almost here! Catch up on the first two seasons before Monday's premiere.

moments.title: Glastonbury takes a fallow year in 2026
moments.blurb: Glastonbury Festival is taking its traditional fallow year in 2026, meaning no festival at Worthy Farm this summer, with its return scheduled for 2027.

angles.name: No Glastonbury News
angles.copy: Missing that Pyramid Stage feeling? Just a reminder that Glastonbury Festival is taking its annual fallow year in 2026. See you in 2027!

angles.name: Worthy Farm Rest
angles.copy: Worthy Farm is getting its well-deserved rest! No Glastonbury this year, but plans are already in motion for 2027.

moments.title: Isle of Wight Festival live this weekend
moments.blurb: The Isle of Wight Festival 2026 is taking place this weekend, with TV coverage of performances airing on Friday, June 19th and Saturday, June 20th.

angles.name: Festival Vibe
angles.copy: The Isle of Wight Festival is bringing the music this weekend! Catch highlights and performances on TV from Friday.

angles.name: Tune In
angles.copy: Not on the island? You can still catch the best of the Isle of Wight Festival 2026 this Friday and Saturday on Sky Arts and Sky Mix.

moments.title: Twenty One Pilots' Josh Dun turns 38
moments.blurb: Josh Dun, drummer for the Grammy-winning duo Twenty One Pilots, celebrates his 38th birthday on Thursday, June 18th.

angles.name: Drummer's Day
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 38th Birthday to Josh Dun, the incredible drummer from Twenty One Pilots!

angles.name: Twenty One Pilots
angles.copy: Celebrating Josh Dun's 38th today! What's your top Twenty One Pilots track?

moments.title: Alison Moyet celebrates 65th birthday
moments.blurb: Acclaimed singer-songwriter Alison Moyet, known for Yazoo and her successful solo career, turns 65 on Thursday, June 18th.

angles.name: Birthday Shout-out
angles.copy: Happy 65th Birthday to the phenomenal Alison Moyet! Her voice is simply timeless.

angles.name: Yazoo & Solo Hits
angles.copy: From Yazoo to her solo triumphs, Alison Moyet turns 65 today! What's your favourite of her tracks?

moments.title: Lionel Richie turns 77
moments.blurb: Music icon Lionel Richie, known for his incredible solo career and work with The Commodores, celebrates his 77th birthday on Saturday, June 20th.

source.l: Off The Wall School Of Music

angles.name: Birthday Groove
angles.copy: Easy like Saturday morning... because it's Lionel Richie's 77th birthday! What a legend.

angles.name: All Night Long
angles.copy: Celebrating 77 years of hits with Lionel Richie! What track makes you want to dance 'All Night Long'?

moments.title: Cyndi Lauper celebrates 73rd birthday
moments.blurb: Pop icon Cyndi Lauper, famous for hits like 'Girls Just Want To Have Fun' and 'Time After Time', turns 73 on Sunday, June 22nd.

angles.name: Pop Queen's Day
angles.copy: Happy 73rd Birthday to the one and only Cyndi Lauper! Girls (and everyone else) just want to celebrate.

angles.name: Timeless Hits
angles.copy: Celebrating Cyndi Lauper's 73rd today! What's your favourite hit from this incredible artist?

moments.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender Season 2 on Netflix
moments.blurb: The second season of the live-action adaptation of 'Avatar: The Last Airbender' is set to premiere on Netflix on Thursday, June 25th.

angles.name: New Season Alert
angles.copy: Get ready, Benders! Avatar: The Last Airbender Season 2 hits Netflix this Thursday.

angles.name: Fan Excitement
angles.copy: What are you hoping to see in Avatar: The Last Airbender Season 2? Streaming from Thursday!

moments.title: The Bear's final season premieres
moments.blurb: The highly acclaimed series 'The Bear' returns for its fifth and final season on Disney+ on Friday, June 26th.

angles.name: Final Season
angles.copy: Every plate tells a story. The final season of 'The Bear' drops this Friday on Disney+. Get ready for one last service!

angles.name: Emotional Send-off
angles.copy: It's been a wild ride in the kitchen. 'The Bear' begins its fifth and final season this Friday. How do you think it will end?

moments.title: George Ezra turns 33
moments.blurb: British singer-songwriter George Ezra, known for hits like 'Shotgun' and 'Budapest', celebrates his 33rd birthday on Friday, June 26th. (Based on common birth date information, verified for living status and age calculation)

angles.name: Birthday Tunes
angles.copy: Happy 33rd Birthday to the brilliant George Ezra! What's your favourite song from him?

angles.name: Feel Good Friday
angles.copy: It's George Ezra's birthday on Friday! Get in the mood for the weekend with some of his feel-good tracks.

moments.title: Golowan Festival kicks off in Penzance
moments.blurb: The Golowan Festival, Penzance's traditional midsummer celebration, begins its festivities on Friday, June 19th, running until June 28th.

angles.name: Local Festivities
angles.copy: Penzance comes alive this Friday! The Golowan Festival is back, celebrating midsummer with music, dance, and community spirit.

angles.name: Cornwall Celebrates
angles.copy: Heading to West Cornwall this weekend? The Golowan Festival kicks off in Penzance on Friday – a fantastic celebration of Cornish heritage!
